elements.label: Description
elements.value: The legendary final tier! Cannot merge further. Creating one is the ultimate achievement.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/watermelon.schema.json, set ct_wm_radius to {{ct_wm_radius}}]
Set Watermelon radius to {{ct_wm_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/watermelon.schema.json, set ct_wm_score to {{ct_wm_score}}]
Set Watermelon merge score to {{ct_wm_score}} points.
